message:
feat(robot): add activity summary generation for session analysis (ntm-srrl)

Implements the core activity summary generation system in synthesis.go.
This provides structured analysis of what each agent accomplished during
a session, enabling users to understand parallel agent work and identify
potential conflicts.

## New Types

SessionSummary: Top-level summary structure containing:
  - Session name and time range
  - Per-agent summaries with activity metrics
  - Total files modified across all agents
  - Detected file conflicts (from ConflictDetector)

AgentOutputSummary: Per-agent metrics including:
  - Activity timing (active vs idle time)
  - Output volume (lines, characters)
  - Content analysis (code blocks, commands run)
  - Files modified by this agent
  - Key actions extracted from output
  - Health indicators (errors, restarts)
  - Current state (generating, idle, error)

SummaryTimeRange: Time window for the analysis with start/end times
and duration.

AgentActivityData: Input structure for raw agent data to be summarized.

## New Functions

SessionSummaryGenerator: Stateful generator that uses ConflictDetector
and OutputCapture to produce summaries.

GenerateSummary(session, since, agentData): Main entry point that:
  1. Builds per-agent summaries from activity data
  2. Aggregates file modifications across agents
  3. Detects conflicts via ConflictDetector
  4. Returns complete SessionSummary

summarizeAgent(): Internal helper that:
  - Calculates activity metrics from timestamps
  - Counts output lines and characters
  - Extracts code blocks and commands from output
  - Identifies key actions using heuristics
  - Detects errors and restarts from output patterns

extractKeyActions(): Heuristic extraction of important actions:
  - Looks for action verbs (Created, Modified, Fixed, Added, Removed)
  - Filters to lines containing file paths
  - Limits to top 5 most relevant actions
  - Cleans and normalizes action text

## Response Formatting

SessionSummaryResponse: Robot-mode JSON wrapper with RobotResponse base.
NewSessionSummaryResponse(): Constructor for JSON responses.
FormatSessionSummaryText(): Human-readable text formatter that produces
clear, scannable output for terminal display.

## Integration Points

- Uses ConflictDetector for file conflict detection
- Uses ExtractCodeBlocks and ExtractCommands from output capture
- Designed for both CLI (ntm summary) and robot mode (--robot-summary)

Part of Output Synthesis epic (ntm-sp0c).
Depends on: ntm-iye0 (output capture), ntm-1m1m (conflict detection).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
